b_findings.angle: Phase 3 parameter linkage to Phase 4 prose
b_findings.finding: bin/cortex-complexity-escalator --worktree-root flag has no documented production invocation site; only Task 8 tests exercise it.

b_findings.angle: Phase 3 parameter linkage to Phase 4 prose
b_findings.finding: Task 1 classifies CWD-pinned vs env-pinned but Task 7 refactors all inventoried sites uniformly with no scope narrowing.

b_findings.angle: Worktree event emission mechanism in §1a is unspecified
b_findings.finding: Task 9 registers interactive_worktree_entered with skills prose as producer but no task adds an executable producer (CLI helper / refactored writer site).

b_findings.angle: Phase 1 inventory size has no quantitative gate or fork point
b_findings.finding: Task 7's 'plus any additional Python modules surfaced by Task 1' silently absorbs unbounded inventory growth without split criterion.
